meta.title: DEF CON 33 - How API flaws led to admin access to 1k+ USA dealers & control of yr car - Eaton Zveare
meta.description: Many automotive dealers in the USA utilize centralized platforms for everything from sales to service to marketing. The interconnectivity of various systems makes things easy to manage, but also exposes certain risks should any of these systems have a vulnerability. API flaws were discovered in a top automaker's dealer platform that enabled the creation of a national admin account. With that level of access, being able to remotely take over your car was only the tip of the iceberg…
